title: Free Demo — 10 Sample Questions
description: Try 10 questions from across all exam topics. No signup required.

questions.question: Fire extinguisher class required near electrical equipment?
questions.explanation: Class C is for energized electrical fires.

questions.question: Maximum overcurrent protection for #14 AWG copper branch circuit?
Voltage drop on 120V, #12 AWG Cu, 30 m run, 16A load?
questions.explanation: Using CEC method: Vd = 2 x 30 x 16 x R/km = ~6.4V (5.3%).

questions.question: 3-phase motor hums but won't start. Voltage on only 2 of 3 phases. Cause?
options: A) Single-phasing (blown fuse/tripped breaker on one phase)
questions.explanation: Single-phasing - one fuse blown or breaker tripped.

questions.question: Swapping two phases of a 3-phase motor causes:
options: B) Draws more current same direction

questions.question: 2-stage fire alarm: Stage 1 activates ___, Stage 2 activates ___:
options: C) Alert signal, then general evacuation alarm
D) Strobes only, then audible alarms

questions.question: Current CEC edition referenced by Ontario (2024)?
CEC section covering solar PV systems?
Cat6 UTP maximum channel length?
options: A) 90 m permanent link, 100 m channel
questions.explanation: 90 m permanent + 10 m patches = 100 m channel.

questions.question: A dwelling unit has 180 m2. What is the basic lighting load?
questions.explanation: 180 m2 x 30 W/m2 (CEC Table 14) = 5,400W basic lighting load.
